generic_name: Alpenyogurt vetro da latte fieno STG - 150g - Gusto frutti di bosco

ingredients_text: Yogurt intero 85% (latte intero, fermenti lattici vivi), frutti di bosco 15% (zucchero, frutti di bosco 8% (mirtilli neri, more, succo concentrato di ribes neri, succo concentrato di sambuco, succo concentrato di lamponi, fragole), sciroppo di glucosio-fruttosio, amido modificato di mais, aroma).
ingredients_text_de: Joghurt 85%, Waldfruchtzubereitung 15% (Zucker, Waldfrüchte 8% (Heidelbeeren, Brombeeren, Schwarzer Johannisbeersaftkonzentrat, Holundersaftkonzentrat, Himbeersaftkonzentrat, Erdbeeren), Glukose-Fruktosesirup, modifizierte Maisstärke, Aromen). Glutenfrei
ingredients_text_en: Yogurt 85%, wild fruit preparation 15% (sugar, forest fruits 8% (blueberries, blackberries, black currant juice concentrate, elderberry juice concentrate, raspberry juice concentrate, strawberries), glucose fructose syrup, modified corn starch, flavors). Gluten free
